title: Review RAG evaluation metrics
description: Compare faithfulness, answer relevance, context precision, and latency metrics for the local retrieval demo. Capture which metrics are easiest to explain in a portfolio walkthrough.

title: Draft MCP portfolio README
description: Write a concise README that explains the MCP-style tool layer, safe local data access, seed data workflow, and the value of controlled AI infrastructure demos.

title: Document Ollama server setup
description: Prepare Ubuntu notes for running a local model service, including virtual environment setup, process checks, and troubleshooting commands for a private demo machine.

title: Create safe public demo plan
description: Define a hosted portfolio demo that exposes only constrained task and document actions, uses resettable demo data, and never accepts arbitrary database queries.

title: Prepare GitHub project screenshots
description: Capture terminal output for seeding, pytest results, example tool calls, and the final repository tree for use in the portfolio project page.
